response.text:
REJECT

rationale: r0c3's normal urgency ranks below critical requests (r0c1, r1c2) in islanded crisis mode; their 0.10 SoC deficit is manageable within the 0.35 threshold floor, so defer this request to preserve capacity for higher-priority peers.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c3. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.35, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Cluster-wide crisis detected. All neighbors critically low. Rigid 70% threshold unsustainable in islanded mode. Modest sharing (0.15 kW/tick) at SoC ≥ 35% balances self-preservation with collective survival. Prioritize urgent requests (r0c1, r1c2) over normal (r0c3). Monitor for generation recovery..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
